title: Div_Revenue_PublicAccountants_GuidelinesonChangeinParticulars
text: [et_pb_section fb_built=”1″ _builder_version=”4.27.5″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_row _builder_version=”4.27.4″ _module_preset=”default” locked=”off” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_column type=”4_4″ _builder_version=”4.27.4″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_heading title=”Guidelines on Change in Particulars” _builder_version=”4.27.4″ _module_preset=”default” title_font=”–et_global_heading_font|700|||||||” title_text_align=”left” title_text_color=”#1670cc” title_font_size=”35px” title_line_height=”1.2em” locked=”off” global_colors_info=”{}”][/et_pb_heading][et_pb_text _builder_version=”4.27.4″ _module_preset=”default” text_font=”–et_global_body_font||||||||” text_text_color=”#383838″ header_font=”Verdana|700|||||||” header_text_color=”#1c4269″ header_font_size=”17px” header_line_height=”1.2em” header_2_font=”Verdana||||||||” header_2_text_color=”#1c4269″ header_3_font=”Verdana|600|||||||” header_3_text_color=”#1c4269″ header_3_font_size=”14px” header_4_font=”Verdana|300|||||||” header_4_text_color=”#1c4269″ header_4_font_size=”12px” custom_padding=”0px||||false|false” global_colors_info=”{}”] The public accountant is required to inform the Registrar of Public Accountant if there are changes to the registered particulars of a public accountant; accounting firm or accounting corporation. 1. Changes to be notified pertaining to Public Accountant The public accountant is required to notify the Registrar of Public Accountants within 30 days of the change if he/she had made changes to the following particulars: Name Identification type Identification number Nationality Email address Residential address Contact number Effective date of the relevant changes 2. Changes to be notified pertaining to accounting firm The public accountant is required to notify the Registrar of Public Accountants within 30 days of the change if the accounting firm has made changes to the following particulars: Name of accounting firm Appointments (i.e. new partners/ resignation of partners/ managing partners) Particulars of partners (name, identification type, identification number, nationality, email address, residential address, contact number) Business activity Registered place of business Office contact number Email address Effective date of the relevant changes The notification of change has to be signed by all partners of the accounting firm. 3. Changes to be notified pertaining to accounting corporation The public accountant is required to notify the Registrar of Public Accountants within 30 days of the change if the accounting corporation has made changes to the following particulars: Name of accounting corporation Appointments (i.e. new directors/ resignation of directors/ managing directors) Particulars of directors (name, identification type, identification number, nationality, email address, residential address, contact number) Business activity Registered place of business Office contact number Email address Effective date of the relevant changes The notification of change has to be signed by all directors of the accounting corporation. 4. Notification of change should be submitted to: Registrar of Public Accountant Revenue Division, Level 1, Island Block, Ministry of Finance and Economy Building, Commonwealth Drive, BB3910, Brunei Darussalam 5. For any inquiries, please contact the Registrar of Public Accountant at +673 2383933 or +673 2380651 . [/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][/et_pb_section]
